versions.title: The Agent Loop
versions.subtitle: Minimal Closed Loop
versions.keyInsight: An agent is just a loop: send messages, execute tools, feed results back, repeat.

versions.title: Tool Use
versions.subtitle: Route Intent into Action
versions.keyInsight: Adding a tool means adding one handler. The loop never changes.

versions.title: TodoWrite
versions.subtitle: Session Planning
versions.keyInsight: A visible plan keeps the agent on track when tasks get complex.

versions.title: Subagent
versions.subtitle: Fresh Context per Subtask
versions.keyInsight: A subagent is mainly a context boundary, not a process trick.

versions.title: Skills
versions.subtitle: Discover Cheap, Load Deep
versions.keyInsight: Discover cheaply, load deeply -- only when needed.

versions.title: Context Compact
versions.subtitle: Keep the Active Context Small
versions.coreAddition: Persist markers + micro compact + summary compact
versions.keyInsight: Compaction isn't deleting history -- it's relocating detail so the agent can keep working.

versions.title: Permission System
versions.subtitle: Intent Must Pass Safety
versions.keyInsight: Safety is a pipeline, not a boolean: deny, check mode, allow, then ask.

versions.title: Hook System
versions.subtitle: Extend Without Rewriting the Loop
versions.keyInsight: The loop owns control flow; hooks only observe, block, or annotate at named moments.

versions.title: Memory System
versions.subtitle: Keep Only What Survives Sessions
versions.keyInsight: Memory gives direction; current observation gives truth.

versions.title: System Prompt
versions.subtitle: Build Inputs as a Pipeline
versions.keyInsight: The model sees a constructed input pipeline, not one giant static string.

versions.title: Error Recovery
versions.subtitle: Recover, Then Continue
versions.keyInsight: Most failures aren't true task failure -- they're signals to try a different path.

versions.title: Task System
versions.subtitle: Durable Work Graph
versions.keyInsight: Todo lists help a session; durable task graphs coordinate work that outlives it.

versions.title: Background Tasks
versions.subtitle: Separate Goal from Running Work
versions.keyInsight: Background execution is a runtime lane, not a second main loop.

versions.title: Cron Scheduler
versions.subtitle: Let Time Trigger Work
versions.keyInsight: Scheduling is not a separate system -- it just feeds the same agent loop from a timer.

versions.title: Agent Teams
versions.subtitle: Persistent Specialists
versions.keyInsight: Teammates persist beyond one prompt, have identity, and coordinate through durable channels.

versions.title: Team Protocols
versions.subtitle: Shared Request-Response Rules
versions.keyInsight: A protocol request is a structured message with an ID; the response must reference the same ID.

versions.title: Autonomous Agents
versions.subtitle: Self-Claim and Self-Resume
versions.coreAddition: Idle polling + role-aware self-claim + resume context
versions.keyInsight: Autonomy is a bounded mechanism -- idle, scan, claim, resume -- not magic.

versions.title: Worktree Isolation
versions.subtitle: Separate Directory, Separate Lane
versions.keyInsight: Tasks answer what; worktrees answer where. Keep them separate.

versions.title: MCP & Plugin
versions.subtitle: External Capability Bus
versions.keyInsight: External capabilities join the same routing, permission, and result-append path as native tools.
